title: Source Categories
description: Enumerations of citation-eligible vs orientation-only source kinds, plus the citation-token regex catalog the R4 preprocessor uses. This file is both a schema (validates the runtime catalog) and the source of truth for the enums other schemas reference.

version.description: Semantic version of the categories catalog. Bumped when categories are added/removed/recategorized.

citation_eligible.description: Source kinds that may appear in deliverable.cites[]. R14 rejects any cite whose kind is not in this list.

orientation_only.description: Source kinds permitted in deliverable.references[] but never in cites[]. Operator may move agency_guidance to citation_eligible by overriding via source-profiles/profile-{a,b}.yaml â€” see PRD Â§11.

pattern.description: ECMAScript-flavor regex. The R4 preprocessor uses these to detect citation tokens that look like quotation candidates but aren't (e.g., 'Â§ 2775(b)(1)(A)').

default.description: U.S. and state statutory section marker, with subdivisions (e.g., Â§ 2775(b)(1)(A)).
US Code: 29 USC 201 or 29 U.S.C. Â§ 201.
State code citations (CA Lab. Code Â§ 2775; Mass. Gen. Laws ch. 149 Â§ 148B).

citation_token_patterns.description: Default catalog ships with the system; per-jurisdiction additions live in `source-profiles/profile-{a,b}.yaml` under `citation_token_patterns_extra`.
